vocab.meaning: sức ảnh hưởng hoặc quyền lực (về mặt xã hội)
vocab.example: In certain elite circles, sporting a limited-edition watch is a way to demonstrate social clout and prestige.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề chế tác vượt trội
vocab.example: High-end watches are often prized for their superior craftsmanship, which involves hundreds of hours of manual labor.

vocab.meaning: một khoản đầu tư hợp lý/khôn ngoan
vocab.example: Many wealthy individuals view luxury timepieces as a sound investment, as certain brands hold or even increase their value over decades.

vocab.meaning: sự sang trọng kín đáo (không phô trương)
vocab.example: Some people prefer watches that embody understated luxury, choosing brands that only fellow connoisseurs would recognize.

vocab.meaning: sự phức tạp về mặt cơ khí
vocab.example: Horologists are often fascinated by the mechanical complexity of a tourbillon or a perpetual calendar movement.

vocab.meaning: truyền tải/xây dựng hình ảnh chuyên nghiệp
vocab.example: A sophisticated watch can help a consultant convey a professional image that suggests punctuality and attention to detail.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng của vật gia bảo (bền bỉ qua nhiều thế hệ)
vocab.example: Expensive watches are built with heirloom quality in mind, intended to be passed down from father to son.

vocab.meaning: sức hút riêng biệt (dành cho một nhóm nhỏ am hiểu)
vocab.example: Independent watchmakers often produce pieces with niche appeal that cater to very specific aesthetic or technical tastes.
While some buy for quality, others wear diamond-encrusted watches simply to flaunt their wealth in public.

vocab.meaning: một dấu hiệu của sự khác biệt/ưu tú
vocab.example: Wearing a rare vintage watch is considered a mark of distinction among serious collectors and enthusiasts.
